source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race in test
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

### What is changed and how it works?
fix test.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->
 - No code

Code changes

Side effects


Related changes

symptoms: ddl: fix data race in test
failure_signature: ddl: fix data race in test
root_cause_explanation: A shared variable used by the DDL hook (the current test case pointer) was read/written concurrently by async DDL worker callbacks and the test goroutine, causing a DATA RACE. The fix adds a mutex and updates the test to read/write the shared pointer under lock.
fix_pattern: Protect shared hook/test state with a mutex (RWMutex around the mutable pointer used by async callbacks).

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race in test

Changed files (1): ddl/ddl_worker_test.go
